title: cienfuegosia affinis var. campestris
intro: Cienfuegosia affinis var. campestris, also known as a variety of the Cienfuegosia plant, is a type of flowering plant native to Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cienfuegosia affinis var. campestris include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions and decoctions, which can be used to create teas and tonics for medicinal purposes.
